# Configuration

::: {.callout-note}
TODO: Full reference for `R/config.R` and `R/data.R`.
:::

## Phase toggles (`R/config.R::CONFIG`)

`ENABLE_DOWNLOAD`, `ENABLE_UNPACK`, `ENABLE_HARMONIZE`, `ENABLE_COMBINED`,
`ENABLE_QUALITY`, `ENABLE_DICTIONARY`, `ENABLE_RENDER_REPORT`, `ENABLE_S3_UPLOAD`,
plus per-tier `ENABLE_UPLOAD_{RAW,INTERMEDIATE,PROCESSED,LOGS}`.

`STRICT_QUALITY_GATES`, `ENABLE_CHECKPOINTS` control failure and skip behavior.

## Year window

`EARLIEST_YEAR = 2012L`, `LATEST_YEAR` bumped each release.

## Forms

`FORMS = c("990", "990ez", "990pf")`; `990combined` is derived in phase 5.

## IRS URL template

`build_soi_url(processing_year, form)` returns the IRS SOI zip URL. Pattern:
`https://www.irs.gov/pub/irs-soi/{YY}eoextract{FORM_TAG}.zip`.
